--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -1,27 +1,46 @@
+import torch

 import torch.nn as nn

+import torch.nn.functional as F

 

 class MLP(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, input_dim, hidden_dim=256, dropout=0.2):

+    def __init__(self, input_dim, hidden_dim, dropout=0.3):

         super().__init__()

-        self.input_dim = input_dim

-        self.hidden_dim = hidden_dim

-        self.dropout_p = dropout

-        h = hidden_dim

         self.net = nn.Sequential(

-            nn.Linear(input_dim, h),

-            nn.BatchNorm1d(h),

+            nn.Linear(input_dim, hidden_dim),

             nn.ReLU(),

             nn.Dropout(dropout),

-            nn.Linear(h, h // 2),

-            nn.BatchNorm1d(h // 2),

+            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),

             nn.ReLU(),

             nn.Dropout(dropout),

-            nn.Linear(h // 2, h // 4),

-            nn.BatchNorm1d(h // 4),

-            nn.ReLU(),

-            nn.Dropout(dropout),

-            nn.Linear(h // 4, 1),

+            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 1),

         )

-

     def forward(self, x):

         return self.net(x).squeeze(-1)

+

+class ResBlock(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, dim, dropout):

+        super().__init__()

+        self.fc = nn.Linear(dim, dim)

+        self.ln = nn.LayerNorm(dim)

+        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

+    def forward(self, x):

+        h = self.fc(x)

+        h = self.ln(h)

+        h = F.relu(h)

+        h = self.dropout(h)

+        return x + h

+

+class ResMLP(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, input_dim, hidden_dim, dropout=0.3, num_layers=3):

+        super().__init__()

+        self.input_proj = nn.Linear(input_dim, hidden_dim)

+        self.input_ln = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)

+        self.blocks = nn.ModuleList([ResBlock(hidden_dim, dropout) for _ in range(num_layers)])

+        self.out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 1)

+    def forward(self, x):

+        h = self.input_proj(x)

+        h = self.input_ln(h)

+        h = F.relu(h)

+        for blk in self.blocks:

+            h = blk(h)

+        return self.out(h).squeeze(-1)

+
